title: The Marines Challenge Arlong — Part 5
scene: On pages 17–18, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. A Marine force confronts Arlong, but the scene exposes how terrifying and entrenched his pirates are.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sorry for making you go through all that trouble, boys...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Heh, it's nothing as long as we know everything there is to know about these seas from the winds to the ocean floors.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: With Nami's sea charts and our abilities, no one can challenge us on the seas.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Speaking of which, NAM's an invaluable member if we're to create our strong empire.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: But didn't you promise to let her and her village go free,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Of course. As I've said before,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm a man who would rather die than break a promise involving money...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And I swear I'll kick your ass!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Luffyy, stop! It's not as if Johnny's the one at fault here!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's no way that Nami would kill usop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's fine if you don't want to believe it...! But I saw it with my very own eyes...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just who did you call crewmates, Luffyy?

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
